section.title: Member CV Details
section.subtitle: Printable member profiles
section.description: Additional CV-style profile content for HUMACH team members, including academic information, experience, projects, publications, certificates, courses, and extracurricular activities.

items.headline: PhD researcher and research-development enthusiast specialising in data analytics, machine learning, deep learning, explainable AI, generative AI, agentic AI, health informatics, biomedical signal processing, and applied software development.

academicInfo.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Computational Science and Mathematical Modelling
academicInfo.institution: Coventry University, Centre for Computational Science and Mathematical Modelling, United Kingdom
academicInfo.details: Cotutelle/joint PhD program with Deakin University. Research topic: A Machine Learning-based Analysis of Sleep Patterns in Healthy Ageing using Physiological Signals. Focus areas include hypnogram-based sleep analysis, sleep disorder detection, interpretable ML, DL, CNN/RNN/GNN methods, and wearable sleep-monitoring feasibility.

academicInfo.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Information Technology
academicInfo.institution: Deakin University, School of Information Technology, Melbourne, Australia
academicInfo.details: Deakin-hosted Cotutelle PhD with Coventry University, supported by Deakin University Postgraduate Research Scholarship (DUPRS). Research is based in applied ML and DL with biomedical signal processing for sleep disorder analysis.

academicInfo.title: Master of Science by Research (MRes) in Information Technology
academicInfo.institution: Deakin University, School of Information Technology, Melbourne, Australia
academicInfo.details: Research-based master’s degree under the Data to Intelligence research environment. Thesis: Minimising Scalp Electroencephalogram (EEG) Channels for Epileptic Seizure Detection. The research applied ML, signal processing, and optimisation to EEG-based seizure detection and channel minimisation.

academicInfo.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
academicInfo.institution: Hajee Mohammad Danesh Science and Technology University (HSTU), Dinajpur, Bangladesh
academicInfo.details: Four-year CSE degree with focus on programming, algorithms, database management, machine learning, pattern recognition, and mobile application development. Final-year thesis/project: J2ME English-to-English Dictionary with Indexed Binary Search.

professionalExperience.title: Graduate Researcher (PhD Student)
professionalExperience.details: Conducts applied ML research for sleep disorder detection using hypnogram data, including sleep dynamics, age-related sleep analysis, noise impact analysis, model evaluation, documentation, and publication preparation.

professionalExperience.title: Research Assistant
professionalExperience.details: Contributed to phases of a healthcare AI project involving generative AI feasibility for ECG-based cardiovascular disorder detection and security/risk assessment for agentic AI-based healthcare platforms.

professionalExperience.title: Graduate Researcher (MRes Student)
professionalExperience.details: Applied machine-learning methods for EEG channel optimisation and epileptic seizure detection, including single/multi-channel EEG analysis, event detection, and factor analysis for real-world seizure detection systems.

professionalExperience.title: Research Assistant
professionalExperience.organization: Deakin University / Monash University / Alfred Health collaboration
professionalExperience.details: Worked on epileptic seizure detection in ICU settings, including data preprocessing, post-processing, ML/DL model evaluation, testing, and visualisation.

professionalExperience.title: Research Assistant
professionalExperience.organization: Monash University and AETMOS Australia collaboration
professionalExperience.details: Worked on indoor air-temperature and air-quality prediction using meteorological and traffic data, investigating environmental-health implications with deep-learning methods.

professionalExperience.title: Research Supervisor
professionalExperience.organization: Hajee Mohammad Danesh Science and Technology University
professionalExperience.details: Conducted academic research and supervised undergraduate research projects in computer science, applied ML, health informatics, and software-oriented research topics.

professionalExperience.title: Digital Research Trainer
professionalExperience.details: Provides programming and machine-learning training for research students and researchers across topics including Python, data manipulation/visualisation, and ML regression, classification, and unsupervised learning.

professionalExperience.title: Graduate Research Teaching Fellow
professionalExperience.details: Assists graduate IT teaching and assessment in machine learning, analytics, database, security, and privacy subjects.

professionalExperience.title: Sessional Academic Staff
professionalExperience.details: Supported graduate IT courses including machine learning, business intelligence, machine learning in business, marketing analytics, and programming-related subjects.

professionalExperience.title: Assistant Professor
professionalExperience.organization: Hajee Mohammad Danesh Science and Technology University
professionalExperience.details: Conducted undergraduate CSE teaching, sessionals, assessment, research, and supervision; on leave for higher studies since February 2020.

professionalExperience.title: Lecturer
professionalExperience.organization: Hajee Mohammad Danesh Science and Technology University
professionalExperience.details: Conducted undergraduate CSE courses and sessionals, including programming, database management, and machine learning, with examination and research responsibilities.

professionalExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer & Project Manager
professionalExperience.details: Managed and developed mobile/web applications, including iOS application design, development, testing, client management, team training, and involvement in 50+ apps.

professionalExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
professionalExperience.details: Designed, developed, implemented, tested, and supported iOS applications for company clients, including training new members.

professionalExperience.title: Junior Programmer
professionalExperience.details: Developed and designed iOS applications and games, including implementation, testing, and game design tasks.
